completed_tasks.name: Fix 'No part types found' — RLS policies + notes_placeholder column
Active car persists cross-device via users.active_car_id + activeCar.ts
Form UX polish — field reorder, labor conditional, Part Number to Full Specs, remove group headers, filter brand dupe, build sheet title-only

remaining_tasks.name: Fix Labor Cost visibility — currently shows when installedBy is null (no selection). Should only show when 'Shop' is explicitly selected.
remaining_tasks.notes: Current condition: `form.installedBy !== 'self'` shows Labor when null too. Fix: `form.installedBy === 'shop'`

remaining_tasks.name: Restore Intake Type / Filter Type selects — they disappeared because renderSpecField returns null when opts.length === 0. The spec_templates for these fields have null/empty options in Supabase. Need to either populate options in spec_templates DB rows or handle them differently.
remaining_tasks.notes: Run this to diagnose: SELECT spec_key, spec_label, input_type, options FROM spec_templates JOIN part_types ON part_types.id = spec_templates.part_type_id WHERE part_types.name = 'Cold Air Intake / Short Ram'; — if options is null/empty for intake_type and filter_type rows, populate them with the correct JSON array in Supabase.

decisions.decision: Labor Cost shown only when installedBy === 'shop' (not just !== 'self')
decisions.rationale: User expectation: Labor Cost is irrelevant until Shop is chosen. Showing it before any selection is chosen adds noise.

decisions.decision: renderSpecField returns null for select/multiselect with empty options — hides label too
decisions.rationale: Previous code showed the label but no input, creating orphaned headers. Full null return is cleaner.

decisions.decision: getActiveCarId() checks localStorage first, falls back to Supabase — no race condition
decisions.rationale: Pages are self-sufficient, no dependency on syncActiveCarFromServer() completing first.

decisions.decision: GRANT SELECT,UPDATE ON users TO authenticated required explicitly
decisions.rationale: PostgreSQL checks privileges before RLS. Fixed in migration 027.

decisions.decision: Build sheet shows mod.title only (not brand · title)
decisions.rationale: Users were including brand in title, causing 'Blitz · Blitz short ram intake' duplication.

decisions.decision: Dev server must run on port 5176
decisions.rationale: getActiveCarId() now falls back to Supabase so this is less critical, but localStorage origin-scoping still matters for other keys.

next_action: 1. Fix Labor Cost: change `form.installedBy !== 'self'` to `form.installedBy === 'shop'` in TuningAddPage.tsx. 2. Diagnose Intake Type / Filter Type: run the SQL above to check spec_templates options for Cold Air Intake. If empty, populate with correct values in Supabase and update the seed data in migration 024.
context_notes: Dev server: npx vite --port 5176 --host. Machine IP: 192.168.3.4. The form UX is mostly good — field order, conditional labor, Part Number in Full Specs, no group headers, no brand dupe. Two small fixes left before the 3-step flow is fully polished.
